stem: A quality control study surveys 500 manufactured units and observes 87 positive outcomes out of 500 (17.4%). Estimate the true product defect rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.174. Wilson 95% CI: [0.1433, 0.2097]. Point estimate: 0.1765.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
